# Terraria Workshops

> Hands-on Moroccan craft workshops in Tetouan and Midelt — pottery, weaving, zellij, embroidery and more — with social impact for local artisans.

Terraria is a social-innovation studio that brings travellers and locals into authentic artisan workshops led by Moroccan potters and weavers. We also run a curated store of handmade goods and partner with hotels and riads across Morocco.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, featured workshops, booking, and impact stats.
- [About](/about): Mission, founders, and the artisans behind Terraria.
- [Store](/store): Handmade pottery, Amazigh rugs, and home goods.
- [Blog](/blog): Stories on Moroccan craft, Zellige, weaving, and culture.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, and studio locations.
- [Retreats](/retreats): Multi-day craft retreats in Morocco.
- [B2B / Corporate](/b2b): Team experiences for companies and partners.
- [EXODAYA Residency](/exodaya): Art and culture residency program.

## Workshops

- [Pottery Experience](/workshop/pottery-experience): Wheel pottery with a master potter.
- [Hand-building](/workshop/handbuilding): Sculpt clay by hand.
- [Embroidery](/workshop/embroidery): Traditional Moroccan embroidery.
- [Zellij](/workshop/zellij): Geometric tile mosaic workshop.
- [Carpets / Weaving](/workshop/carpets): Amazigh rug weaving in Midelt.
- [Paint a Pot & Plant](/workshop/gardening): Family-friendly pot painting and planting.

## Optional

- [Partners](/partners): Hotels and riads that work with Terraria.
